title: epipactis helleborine subsp. latifolia
intro: Epipactis helleborine subsp. latifolia is a rare, terrestrial orchid native to Europe, known for its distinctive yellow-green flowers and broad leaves. This plant is used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Epipactis helleborine subsp. latifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic to combat infections. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing its leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
